category_sources: source_facts.description says it audits AWS/GCP infrastructure for misconfiguration or security issues; official GitHub README describes YATAS as an infrastructure misconfiguration/security audit tool.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses 'YATAS'; source_facts.name is yatas.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains installation, usage, plugin, and check configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/padok-team/yatas; per instruction repo was not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub topics/README identify CLI, AWS, GCP, security, cloud, audit, configuration, hardening, and DevSecOps focus.
